message:
feat(durability): adversarial decode-drill with fail-closed validation (E10)

Implement success bounds verification for RaptorQ decode drill:
- classify_decode_drill_packets: separates source from repair packets
  using OTI partition metadata
- verify_decode_drill_fail_closed: proves decoder fails when dropping
  one more packet than the repair symbol count
- Add dropped_packets and fail_closed_beyond fields to DecodeProof
- New error variants: DecodeDrillPacketLayout, DecodeDrillFailOpen

This enables CI to verify that the durability envelope actually provides
the claimed resilience guarantees, not just that decoding succeeds.

Closes: franken_networkx-pubz (E10)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
